title: coelogyne reniformis
intro: Coelogyne reniformis, also known as the kidney orchid, is a species of flowering orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coelogyne reniformis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
